title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: LORNA BYRNE MIDDLE SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 102 S Junction Avenue Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Students and staff of schools in the Three Rivers School District Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-4pm, during school session (541) 592-6978 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 592-6978 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Three Rivers School District Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LORNA BYRNE MIDDLE SCHOOL SBHC
